sections.title: Paragraph Writing — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Paragraph Writing is an essential building block of English. Formula: Topic sentence + 2-3 supporting sentences + concluding thought. Rules: A paragraph starts with one clear topic sentence stating the main idea | Supporting sentences give reasons, examples, or details | Keep tense consistent throughout the paragraph | End with a short concluding or reflective sentence
sections.formula: Topic sentence + 2-3 supporting sentences + concluding thought

examples.hindi: मेरा पसंदीदा मौसम बारिश का मौसम है।
examples.english: My favourite season is the rainy season.

examples.hindi: बारिश में सब कुछ हरा-भरा हो जाता है।
examples.english: Everything becomes green in the rain.

examples.hindi: मुझे किताबें पढ़ना बहुत पसंद है।
examples.english: I like reading books a lot.

examples.hindi: किताबें ज्ञान का भंडार होती हैं।
examples.english: Books are a treasure of knowledge.

examples.hindi: मेरा गाँव बहुत सुंदर है।
examples.english: My village is very beautiful.

examples.hindi: वहाँ हरे-भरे खेत और साफ हवा है।
examples.english: There are green fields and clean air there.

sections.title: Paragraph Writing — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Paragraph Writing for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Topic sentence + 2-3 supporting sentences + concluding thought

examples.hindi: शिक्षा जीवन में बहुत महत्वपूर्ण है।
examples.english: Education is very important in life.

examples.hindi: यह हमें एक बेहतर इंसान बनाती है।
examples.english: It makes us a better person.

examples.hindi: समय का सदुपयोग करना चाहिए।
examples.english: We should make good use of time.

examples.hindi: जो समय बर्बाद करता है, वह पछताता है।
examples.english: The one who wastes time regrets later.

examples.hindi: स्वास्थ्य ही असली धन है।
examples.english: Health is real wealth.

examples.hindi: हमें रोज़ व्यायाम करना चाहिए।
examples.english: We should exercise daily.

sections.title: Paragraph Writing — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Paragraph Writing — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Paragraph Writing in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Topic sentence + 2-3 supporting sentences + concluding thought

examples.hindi: मेरी माँ मेरी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त है।
examples.english: My mother is my best friend.

examples.hindi: वह हमेशा मेरा साथ देती है।
examples.english: She always supports me.

examples.hindi: प्रकृति हमें बहुत कुछ सिखाती है।
examples.english: Nature teaches us a lot.

examples.hindi: हमें पेड़ों की रक्षा करनी चाहिए।
examples.english: We should protect trees.

sections.title: Paragraph Writing — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Paragraph Writing — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Paragraph Writing. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Topic sentence + 2-3 supporting sentences + concluding thought

examples.hindi: भारत विविधताओं का देश है।
examples.english: India is a country of diversities.

examples.hindi: यहाँ कई भाषाएँ और संस्कृतियाँ हैं।
examples.english: There are many languages and cultures here.

examples.hindi: मेहनत सफलता की कुंजी है।
examples.english: Hard work is the key to success.

examples.hindi: जो मेहनत करता है वह जरूर सफल होता है।
examples.english: The one who works hard definitely succeeds.
